# Myztic Playground

> Myztic Playground is a free, no-signup HTML, CSS, and JavaScript playground with live preview, local browser save, and ZIP export. It is built for beginners, teachers, prototypers, and developers who need a fast frontend testing space without accounts or setup.

Myztic Playground runs browser-native HTML, CSS, and JavaScript only. It does not provide backend execution, npm packages, cloud project sync, public profiles, or collaboration. The latest project is stored in the current browser profile; ZIP export is the recommended portable backup.

## Languages

- [English](https://playground.myztic.dev/): Default English site.
- [Español](https://playground.myztic.dev/es): Complete Spanish edition.
- [llms.txt en español](https://playground.myztic.dev/es/llms.txt): Spanish-language product and page guide.

## Primary pages

- [Open the playground](https://playground.myztic.dev/app): Write and run browser-native HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- [Examples](https://playground.myztic.dev/examples): Remix six small frontend projects.
- [For teachers](https://playground.myztic.dev/for-teachers): Classroom and workshop use cases.
- [Learn HTML, CSS, and JavaScript](https://playground.myztic.dev/learn/html-css-js-playground): Beginner practice workflow.
- [ZIP export](https://playground.myztic.dev/export-html-css-js-zip): Download index.html, styles.css, and script.js.
- [Sandbox security](https://playground.myztic.dev/safe-javascript-playground): Preview isolation and limitations.
- [Privacy](https://playground.myztic.dev/privacy): Local saving and data handling.
- [Local save](https://playground.myztic.dev/local-save-code-playground): How browser storage works and when to export a backup.
- [Beginner playground](https://playground.myztic.dev/html-css-js-playground-for-beginners): A four-step browser-native learning path.
- [Live JavaScript preview](https://playground.myztic.dev/online-javascript-playground-live-preview): DOM and client-side JavaScript testing.
- [Browser-based frontend playground](https://playground.myztic.dev/browser-based-frontend-playground): No-install frontend prototyping and its limits.

## Comparisons

- [Myztic Playground vs CodePen](https://playground.myztic.dev/alternatives/codepen)
- [Myztic Playground vs JSFiddle](https://playground.myztic.dev/alternatives/jsfiddle)
- [CodePen vs JSFiddle vs Myztic Playground](https://playground.myztic.dev/codepen-vs-jsfiddle-vs-myztic-playground): A balanced chooser table.
- [Best free no-signup playground](https://playground.myztic.dev/best-free-html-css-js-playground-no-signup): A decision checklist.

## Policies and updates

- [Privacy](https://playground.myztic.dev/privacy): Local storage, analytics, project-source, and ZIP handling.
- [JavaScript sandbox and limits](https://playground.myztic.dev/safe-javascript-playground): Preview isolation, blocked capabilities, and safety limitations.
- [Changelog](https://playground.myztic.dev/changelog): Current user-facing features and content updates.
- [Sitemap](https://playground.myztic.dev/sitemap.xml): Complete crawlable URL inventory.

## Project

- [About Myztic Playground](https://playground.myztic.dev/about): Product purpose, intended scope, and maintainer.
- [Source code](https://github.com/myzticdev/myztic-playground): Public repository maintained by Myzticdev.
